# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder:30b)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Network with subnets for a three-tier application (web, app, database). Use basic VNet configuration with default settings for rapid deployment. Skip DDoS protection and advanced networking features to reduce costs in our development environment.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cloud network security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cloud_network_security

parameters:
  vnetName:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "threeTierVNet"
    metadata:
      description: Name of the virtual network
  location:
    type: string
    defaultValue: "East US"
    metadata:
      description: Azure region for deployment

variables:
  addressPrefix: "10.0.0.0/16"
  webSubnetPrefix: "10.0.1.0/24"
  appSubnetPrefix: "10.0.2.0/24"
  dbSubnetPrefix: "10.0.3.0/24"

resources:
- type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "[parameters('vnetName')]"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    addressSpace:
      addressPrefixes:
        - "[variables('addressPrefix')]"
    subnets:
      - name: "webSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[variables('webSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'webNSG')]"
      - name: "appSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[variables('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'appNSG')]"
      - name: "dbSubnet"
        properties:
          addressPrefix: "[variables('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
          networkSecurityGroup:
            id: "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', 'dbNSG')]"

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "webNSG"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowHTTPS"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: "Tcp"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "443"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Allow"
          direction: "Inbound"
      - name: "AllowHTTP"
        properties:
          priority: 110
          protocol: "Tcp"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "80"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Allow"
          direction: "Inbound"
      - name: "DenyAll"
        properties:
          priority: 1000
          protocol: "*"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "*"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Deny"
          direction: "Inbound"

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "appNSG"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowAppToDB"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: "Tcp"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "1433"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[variables('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "[variables('dbSubnetPrefix')]"
          access: "Allow"
          direction: "Outbound"
      - name: "AllowAppToWeb"
        properties:
          priority: 110
          protocol: "Tcp"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "80"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[variables('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "[variables('webSubnetPrefix')]"
          access: "Allow"
          direction: "Outbound"
      - name: "DenyAll"
        properties:
          priority: 1000
          protocol: "*"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "*"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Deny"
          direction: "Inbound"

- type: Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups
  apiVersion: "2020-06-01"
  name: "dbNSG"
  location: "[parameters('location')]"
  properties:
    securityRules:
      - name: "AllowAppToDB"
        properties:
          priority: 100
          protocol: "Tcp"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "1433"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "[variables('appSubnetPrefix')]"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Allow"
          direction: "Inbound"
      - name: "DenyAll"
        properties:
          priority: 1000
          protocol: "*"
          sourcePortRange: "*"
          destinationPortRange: "*"
          sourceAddressPrefix: "*"
          destinationAddressPrefix: "*"
          access: "Deny"
          direction: "Inbound"
